name: Datanyze B2B Sales Intelligence API
what_it_does: B2B sales intelligence platform with API — providing technographic data (technology stacks used by companies), company contact data, market share analysis by technology category, and competitive displacement signals to help sales teams identify prospects using competitor products.
use_cases: Querying technology stack data for accounts to identify competitive displacement opportunities
Pulling market share analytics for technology categories to size addressable market
Enriching CRM accounts with current technology usage for sales context
Filtering prospect lists by specific technology usage (e.g., companies using Salesforce)
Monitoring technology adoption changes at target accounts for timely outreach
not_for: Deep company firmographics and full contact enrichment (use ZoomInfo or Apollo)
Intent data and buying signal monitoring (use Bombora or G2 Buyer Intent)
Website visitor identification (use Leadfeeder or Albacross)
best_when: A sales team wants to target prospects based on their current technology stack — especially for competitive displacement sales where knowing a competitor is in use at a prospect triggers outreach.
avoid_when: You need comprehensive contact data, behavioral intent signals, or deep firmographic enrichment beyond technology stack — Datanyze specializes in technographics.

auth.notes: API key from Datanyze account. Passed as api_key query parameter or Authorization header. Account-scoped access. No webhooks. Credit-based usage model for data lookups. ZoomInfo acquired Datanyze in 2021.

pricing.paid_tiers: Nyze Pro $29/month (160 credits); Nyze Pro 2 $55/month (320 credits)
pricing.notes: San Mateo-based company. Founded 2012. Acquired by ZoomInfo (2021). Pioneer in technographic data. Tracks 35,000+ web technologies across 50M+ websites. Market share analytics by technology category. Chrome extension for on-page tech stack lookup. Post-acquisition, integrated into ZoomInfo data platform. Standalone API available for technographic data.

performance.rate_limits: Credit-based limits per plan; no time-based rate limits documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for technographic lookups, company profiles, and market share. API key auth. Moderate documentation. ZoomInfo acquisition may affect standalone API availability. Credit-based pricing requires cost tracking per API call. Technology data freshness varies.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Technology lookup reads fully idempotent. Company profile reads idempotent. Market share reads idempotent by date.
known_agent_gotchas: Credit-based pricing — each API call consumes credits, implement cost tracking
ZoomInfo acquisition may redirect to ZoomInfo API for enterprise use cases
api_key in query parameter option — avoid URL logging with key exposed
Technology data may have staleness — verify freshness before competitive decisions
Market share data is estimate-based — confidence intervals not always provided

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. US data residency. API key auth. api_key in query parameter is insecure — prefer Authorization header. ZoomInfo acquisition brings enterprise security standards. Technographic competitive data is sensitive — restrict access.
